Class DefaultTaskFinishedInfo

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.prover.impl.DefaultTaskFinishedInfo
All Implemented Interfaces:
TaskFinishedInfo
Direct Known Subclasses:
ProofMacroFinishedInfo
public class DefaultTaskFinishedInfo extends Object implements TaskFinishedInfo
A concrete implementation of the TaskFinishedInfo interface. This class holds additional information about a task that has been completed, including the source, result, proof, execution time, the number of applied rules, and closed goals.

This implementation is used to track task completion details about the proof search.

The task result may either be an exception (e.g., a Throwable) or specific information about the proof search (strategy execution, proof macros or similar).

  • Constructor Details

    • DefaultTaskFinishedInfo

      public DefaultTaskFinishedInfo(Object source, Object result, Proof proof, long time, int appliedRules, int closedGoals)
      Constructs a new DefaultTaskFinishedInfo object with the provided details.
      Parameters:
      source - The source object that initiated the task.
      result - The result of the task execution.
      proof - The proof worked on by the task.
      time - The time taken for the task to complete, in milliseconds.
      appliedRules - The number of rules applied during the task.
      closedGoals - The number of goals closed during the task.

  • Method Details

    • getTime

      public long getTime()
      Retrieves the total time spent to complete the task, measured in milliseconds. This provides insight into the task's performance and time consumption.
      Specified by:
      getTime in interface TaskFinishedInfo
      Returns:
      The time taken by the task to finish, in milliseconds.

    • getResult

      public Object getResult()
      Retrieves the result of the task. This result may represent the outcome of the task execution, such as an exception (e.g., a Throwable), success status, or specific information about the strategy or proof.
      Specified by:
      getResult in interface TaskFinishedInfo
      Returns:
      The result of the task, which could vary depending on the task's nature.

    • getSource

      public Object getSource()
      Retrieves the source object of the finished task. The source could be any object that initiated or is associated with the task, such as a proof macro, a strategy applied, or a proof loader.
      Specified by:
      getSource in interface TaskFinishedInfo
      Returns:
      The source object associated with the task.

    • getAppliedRules

      public int getAppliedRules()
      Retrieves the number of rules that were applied during the task execution.
      Specified by:
      getAppliedRules in interface TaskFinishedInfo
      Returns:
      The number of applied rules.

    • getClosedGoals

      public int getClosedGoals()
      Retrieves the number of goals that were closed during the task execution.
      Specified by:
      getClosedGoals in interface TaskFinishedInfo
      Returns:
      The number of goals that were closed during the task.

    • getProof

      public Proof getProof()
      Retrieves the proof associated with the task.
      Specified by:
      getProof in interface TaskFinishedInfo
      Returns:
      The proof object related to the task.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the task's status. This message is typically used for displaying in a status bar.

      The message includes details about the number of rules applied, the time taken, the number of goals closed, and the number of remaining open goals.

      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      A status message summarizing the task's execution details.
